dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3620 IS: Emergency Rural Water Response Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Schiff (for himself and Mr. Husted) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry

form.official-title: To amend the Consolidated Farm and Rural Development Act to expand eligibility for grants related to emergency water assistance, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Emergency Rural Water Response Act of 2026.

section.header: Emergency and imminent community water assistance grant program
section.text: Section 306A of the Consolidated Farm and Rural Development Act (7 U.S.C. 1926a) is amended—

subparagraph.text: by redesignating subparagraphs (C) and (D) as subparagraphs (D) and (E), respectively; and
by inserting after subparagraph (B) the following:
for associated uses related to water resources infrastructure, including facilities for potable water, wastewater, storm drainage, or solid waste;

paragraph.text: in subsection (e)(1)(A), by striking 10,000 and inserting 35,000.
